target.title: fix(agents): suggest closest tool matches on unknown tool_call id
target.body:
## What does this PR do?

Adds closest-match suggestions to the `tool_call` unknown-id error in Tool Search. When the model passes a guessed tool name (e.g. `file_write` instead of `write`), the error now includes up to 3 closest catalog matches via Levenshtein distance plus a hint to use `tool_search`, enabling self-correction within the same turn.

## Related Issue

Fixes #92273

## Type of Change

- [x] Bug fix (non-breaking)

## Changes Made

- `src/agents/tool-search.ts`: Add `levenshtein()` and `formatUnknownToolError()` helpers; update `findEntry()` and `findEntryByExactId()` to include closest-match suggestions in error messages

## How to Test

1. Enable Tool Search with `tools.toolSearch: { enabled: true, mode: "tools" }`
2. Have the model call `tool_call` with a non-existent tool name (e.g. `file_write`)
3. The error should now suggest closest matches (e.g. `write`) instead of a bare "Unknown tool id"

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed:**
When Tool Search is enabled and the model guesses a tool name that doesn't exist in the catalog (e.g. `file_write` from the file-transfer plugin docs instead of the core `write` tool), the runtime returns a bare `Unknown tool id: file_write` with no recovery guidance. On silent flush turns (NO_REPLY), this causes durable memories to be silently lost.

**Real environment tested:**
macOS 26.4.1, Node.js, vitest 4.1.7 — unit tests only (not tested in live OpenClaw environment with real model)

**Exact steps or command run after the patch:**
```bash
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/tool-search.test.ts --reporter=verbose
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/liuhao/.hermes/workdir/openclaw

 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > enables object config when a mode is set 5ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > falls back to structured controls when code mode is unsupported 1ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > compacts plugin tools behind the code surface and can search, describe, and call them 59ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > scopes catalogs by run id when attempts share a session 1ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > uses the runtime-local catalog ref before the shared catalog registry 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > keeps raw fallback tools and hides the code tool in tools mode 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > drops inactive controls when the selected Tool Search control is unavailable 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > moves client tools into the same catalog when a session catalog exists 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > wraps cataloged OpenClaw tools with before_tool_call hooks 98ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > does not re-wrap abort-wrapped tools that already have before_tool_call hooks 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > uses a unique bridged tool call id for repeated calls 110ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > routes bridged calls through the configured catalog executor 56ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > projects target tool calls after their Tool Search wrapper result 1ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > does not execute fire-and-forget bridged calls after code returns 55ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > waits for started bridged calls before returning code-mode success 103ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > does not expose the host process to model-authored code 225ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > preserves code-mode bridge errors from the child process 57ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > does not expose host-realm bridge result objects to model-authored code 56ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > does not let model-authored code access bridge controller locals 54ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > terminates async continuations that block the event loop after a bridge call 801ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > aborts already-started bridged calls when code mode times out 1002ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > reuses an unchanged catalog within the same run 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > restores an unchanged catalog after run cleanup 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > does not reuse when a same-named tool uses a different executable 0ms
 ✓  agents  src/agents/tool-search.test.ts > Tool Search > does not reuse when a same-named tool changes parameters 0ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed (25)
   Start  at  07:28:14
   Duration  3.76s (transform 561ms, setup 80ms, import 937ms, tests 2.69s, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 6.65s
```

**Evidence after fix:**
All 25 existing tests pass. The error message format changes from `Unknown tool id: X` to `Unknown tool id: X. Did you mean: - closest_match (description) ... Use tool_search to discover available tools.` when the catalog has entries.

**Observed result after fix:**
No regression in existing tool-search behavior. The new Levenshtein suggestions are additive — they only appear when the catalog has entries and the tool ID is unknown.

**What was not tested:**
- Live environment with real model (WhatsApp/Telegram/Ollama) — requires manual verification
- The actual memory flush recovery path (requires full session with memory-core plugin)

## Checklist
- [x] Read Contributing Guide
- [x] Conventional Commits
- [x] Searched for duplicates
- [x] Only related changes
- [x] Tests pass (25/25)
- [x] Tested on macOS
